# services.matrix-hookshot

<!-- AUTO-GENERATED by scripts/nix-options.sh. Do not edit by hand. -->

All options under `services.matrix-hookshot`.

| Option | Type | Description |
| --- | --- | --- |
| `services.matrix-hookshot.enable` | `boolean` | Whether to enable matrix-hookshot, a bridge between Matrix and project management services. |
| `services.matrix-hookshot.package` | `package` | The matrix-hookshot package to use. |
| `services.matrix-hookshot.registrationFile` | `absolute path` | Appservice registration file. As it contains secret tokens, you may not want to add this to the publicly readable Nix store. |
| `services.matrix-hookshot.serviceDependencies` | `list of string` | List of Systemd services to require and wait for when starting the application service, such as the Matrix homeserver if it's running on the same host. |
| `services.matrix-hookshot.settings` | `open submodule of (YAML 1.1 value)` | {file}`config.yml` configuration as a Nix attribute set. For details please see the [documentation](https://matrix-org.github.io/matrix-hookshot/latest/setup/sample-configuration.html). |
| `services.matrix-hookshot.settings.passFile` | `absolute path` | A passkey used to encrypt tokens stored inside the bridge. File will be generated if not found. |
